title: UGC NET June 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: UGC NET June 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: UGC NET Exam Date 2026 is officially announced: Exam will be held from 22 June to 30 June 2026. Online application open till 20 May 2026. Check full schedule, application fee, exam pattern & syllabus.

content.text: The UGC-NET June 2026 examination will be conducted from 22 June 2026 to 30 June 2026. The online application process is open from 29 April 2026 to 20 May 2026. This national-level exam determines eligibility for Junior Research Fellowship (JRF), Assistant Professor, and Ph.D. admission in Indian universities and colleges.
Direct Link to Check Offficial Notification PDF: Click Here

rows: Last Date for Payment of Application Fee

sections.heading: How to Apply for UGC NET June 2026

items: Register and fill the online application form.
Upload required documents and pay the application fee.
Submit the form and take a printout.

content.text: The exam consists of two papers conducted in a single session of 3 hours without any break.
Each question carries 2 marks. No negative marking.

Paper I: General Paper on Teaching & Research Aptitude (Common for all candidates). It covers Teaching Aptitude, Research Aptitude, Reasoning, Comprehension, Communication, Mathematical Reasoning, Data Interpretation, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), People and Environment, and Higher Education System.
Paper II: Subject-specific syllabus based on the candidate’s chosen subject (out of 85 subjects). Detailed syllabus for all subjects is available on the official UGC website.
